## What this changes

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (Pulse stays standard-library only; `tzdata` on Windows is the lone exception)
- [ ] Works cross-platform (no telemetry, no outbound calls beyond the single usage-API request)
- [ ] Comments / docs updated if behavior changed
